lab.notes: Auto Color Library swatch sample (https://www.autocolorlibrary.com/pages/2019-Bmw.html). Image data/sources/autocolorlibrary/pages/2019-bmw/2019_BMW_01.jpg; bbox 532,1612 100×100. Online chip; replace with spectro LAB before production claims. Pilot: window chosen to minimize RGB distance to PaintRef hex #D9DED3 (automated placement).
